name: list_drones
description: List all available drone IDs in the simulation. Use this to discover which drones are available before sending commands.

name: list_houses
description: List all 20 house locations (A through T) with their X,Y coordinates. Use this to find valid navigation targets and their positions.

name: get_drone_status
description: Get detailed status of a specific drone including its position, velocity, heading, altitude, state, and current task. Use this to check where a drone is and what it is doing before issuing new commands.

name: takeoff_drone
description: Command a drone to take off and ascend to the specified altitude. The drone auto-initializes if needed. Use this before move or rotate commands. Not needed before goto-house (which auto-takes-off).

drone_id.description: The drone to take off. Case-insensitive.

altitude.description: Target altitude in meters above ground. If omitted, uses the service default (~20m).

name: land_drone
description: Command a drone to land at its current position. Use this to safely bring a drone down after completing its task.

name: navigate_drone_to_house
description: Navigate a drone to a specific house (A-T). The drone positions itself at a viewing distance facing the house. Auto-takes-off if the drone is landed. This is the preferred command for sending drones to houses — use it instead of move_drone_to_position when targeting a house.

speed.description: Flight speed in meters per second.

view_distance.description: Distance from the house to hover at in meters. 0 = directly above.

name: move_drone_to_position
description: Move a drone to an arbitrary X,Y coordinate. Use this for precise positioning that is not tied to a house. The drone must be airborne first (use takeoff_drone or navigate_drone_to_house first).

x.description: Target X coordinate in meters (positive = North).

y.description: Target Y coordinate in meters (positive = East).

altitude.description: Target altitude in meters above ground. If omitted, maintains current altitude.

speed.description: Movement speed in meters per second.

name: change_drone_altitude
description: Change a drone's altitude while maintaining its current X,Y position. Use this for altitude surveys or adjusting inspection height.

altitude.description: Target altitude in meters above ground.

speed.description: Vertical speed in meters per second.

name: rotate_drone
description: Rotate a drone to face a specific compass heading while hovering in place. Use this to aim the camera in a particular direction, e.g., for multi-angle house inspections.

heading.description: Target heading in degrees. 0 = North, 90 = East, 180 = South, 270 = West.

name: capture_drone_photo
description: Capture photos from a drone's camera. Returns file paths to the saved images. Use this after positioning and aiming the drone at a target.

drone_id.description: The drone whose camera to use. Case-insensitive.

name: fleet_formation_flight
description: Fly all 5 drones in formation to a house with one drone designated as the leader. Available formations: v (V-shape), line (side-by-side), diamond, echelon (diagonal), column (single file). All drones auto-initialize and auto-takeoff. Use this when you want coordinated fleet movement.

leader.description: The drone that leads the formation. Case-insensitive.

speed.description: Flight speed in meters per second.

name: fleet_land_all
description: Command all drones in the fleet to land at their current positions. Use this to safely end a mission or bring all drones down.

name: emergency_stop
description: Immediately stop all drones and command them to hover in place. Use this in any unsafe situation or when you need to halt all movement instantly. After calling this, use /fleet/clear-emergency before resuming normal operations.
